author: Haroen Viaene
subject: v3.2.2-beta0
body: ## [3.2.2-beta0](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v3.2.1...v3.2.2-beta0) (2017-03-20) ### Bug Fixes * **InfiniteHits:** provide translation key for `Load More` (algolia/react-instantsearch#2048) ([501a798](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/501a798)) * **SearchBox:** better mobile behaviour by default ([aaff047](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/aaff047)) * **example:** link to instantsearch/react (algolia/react-instantsearch#2007) ([5c5b7ac](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/5c5b7ac)) * **recipes:** react router v4 ([93bae59](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/93bae59)) ### Features * **SearchBox:** add role=search to the form (algolia/react-instantsearch#2046) ([31c767d](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/31c767d)) * **SearchBox:** allow custom reset and submit components (algolia/react-instantsearch#1991) ([72bdba2](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/72bdba2)) * **searchBox:** add event handling ([b636e46](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/b636e46)), closes [algolia/react-instantsearch#2017](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2017)
